reviews.author: Prudhviik
reviews.review_body:
Best school
Teachers are friendly and they understand what problems you are going to and they will help you and take care of you.
It is a great school to know abt culture and doesn't promote usage of plastic and really helps students to pick up waste in school.
Coming to Academics it is a great school!
Experienced student

reviews.author: D V BHASKAR REDDY
reviews.review_body:
My friend's kid is studying UKG in your pre primary campus.He has been in your school for two years but without even learning Alphabet and number names.you always keep saying that you are following
play way method and activity based method.okay it is good you are following that method of teaching but what's the use if the kid is not even able to read and pronounce three or four letter words and write numbers and number names even after UKG has completed..how would he be able to coup up with first class syllabus...and be able to read and write sentences and understand.surprisingly the same kid has learnt numbers upto 1000,number names,is able to spell 4,5,6 letter words,learnt tables upto 6 or 7 and doing two digit additions easily after I have joined him in a near by tution centre.I don't know where the fault lies,please take necessary steps to correct it..

reviews.author: Bhadri Sreeramireddy
reviews.review_body: Very good teaching and activities, Teachers responsibility is good

reviews.author: Raja Sekhar Reddy
reviews.review_body: I WILL ALWAYS TELL MY FRIENDS TO PREFER THIS SCHOOL AND HEMALATHA MAM MADE IT EXCELLENT BY MAKING ECO FRIENDLY SCHOOL

reviews.author: GANESH BANDREDDY
reviews.review_body:
Very wast school in the world.
Teacher don't have respect to parents.
Class rooms are dirty.
They are not allowing children to play.
Takeing more money.
Plz 🙏🙏 don't allow your child to join in this school .

reviews.review_body:

reviews.author: Kzkzk Kksk
reviews.review_body: No star for this school waste school no proper sudies

reviews.author: Seetha Manohar Rao Nibhanupudi
reviews.review_body: Excellent School. Principal Madam, Teachers & support staff take care of children very well. They run school with values & ethics. We all parents should understand & support school authorities so that they douch more great work. Thank you for having my both children in your school. Appreciate all your commitment, mentoring & direction you are giving to my children.
